Label: FR-1
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the system should handle unsupported devices or communication failures.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall provide error messages and fallback procedures when unsupported devices are detected or communication failures occur.

Label: FR-2
Issue: The requirement does not specify the security measures for wireless communication.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall use encryption and secure protocols (e.g., WPA3) for all wireless communications between the DH Gateway Device and home devices.

Label: FR-3
Issue: The requirement does not specify the behavior when the temperature or humidity is outside the sensor's sensitivity range.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall provide alerts and fallback procedures when temperature or humidity readings are outside the sensor's sensitivity range.

Label: FR-4
Issue: The requirement does not specify how the system should handle simultaneous user access.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall support concurrent user access and provide mechanisms to handle conflicts, such as locking mechanisms or user notifications.

Label: FR-5
Issue: The requirement does not specify the behavior when the system fails to update environmental conditions within the specified time.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall provide alerts and fallback procedures when environmental conditions are not updated within the specified time.

Label: NFR-1
Issue: The requirement does not specify the performance metrics for the web interface.
Correction: The DigitalHome System web interface shall load within 2 seconds and respond to user actions within 1 second.

Label: NFR-2
Issue: The requirement does not specify the reliability metrics for the backup and recovery mechanisms.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall ensure that backup and recovery mechanisms have a success rate of 99.99%.

Label: NFR-3
Issue: The requirement does not specify the security measures for user authentication.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall use multi-factor authentication (MFA) for user login and encrypt all user data using AES-256.

Label: NFR-4
Issue: The requirement does not specify the maintenance procedures for software updates.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall provide automated software updates and notify users of any required manual interventions.

Label: NFR-5
Issue: The requirement does not specify the usability standards for the user interface.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall adhere to WCAG 2.1 AA standards for accessibility and usability.

Label: NFR-6
Issue: The requirement does not specify the scalability metrics for the system.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall support up to 1000 devices and 100 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: NFR-7
Issue: The requirement does not specify the environmental requirements for the hardware.
Correction: The DigitalHome System hardware shall operate within a temperature range of 0°C to 50°C and humidity range of 10% to 90% non-condensing.

Label: NFR-8
Issue: The requirement does not specify the data retention policy.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall retain user data for a minimum of 5 years and provide options for data export and deletion.

Label: NFR-9
Issue: The requirement does not specify the interoperability with third-party devices.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall support integration with third-party devices using standard protocols such as Zigbee, Z-Wave, and MQTT.

Label: NFR-10
Issue: The requirement does not specify the testing procedures for system validation.
Correction: The DigitalHome System shall undergo rigorous testing, including unit tests, integration tests, and user acceptance tests, to ensure compliance with all specified requirements.
